title: triticum triunciale
intro: Triticum triunciale, also known as wild einkorn, is an ancient type of wheat that is considered a relic of the earliest cultivated wheat species. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Triticum triunciale include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and provide essential nutrients such as iron and B vitamins. Triticum triunciale can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
